summary: Added a compact Worlds Launch level-select surface and reduced the default Worlds deck to the core play surfaces.
changes: Added #worlds-launch above the Worlds play surfaces.
Rendered live world, realm, gate, custom-game, stage, and future-slot stats from the existing snapshot contract.
Added priority lane buttons that open the deep Path Map.
Added Loom, Arcade, Registry, Genesis, and Asset launch tiles.
Moved relay, setup, audit, and expansion boards out of the default Worlds deck into Command or Library while keeping them available in All.
Compressed mobile launcher rails with internal horizontal scrolling for actions and lanes.

browser.click_check: Genesis launch tile switches to Library and reveals #lane-genesis-foundry.

next_iteration: Replace more static global panels with first-screen compact launchers.
Create a stronger animated visual language for lane cards and minigame transitions.
Continue reducing default deck height while preserving All as the full audit mode.
